# Asset Credits & Licenses — "Gabby is 22!!"

This file is the single source of truth for the provenance and license of every
asset shipped in the game. PLAN-11's acceptance requires **no license-unknown
assets**; completing this file is what satisfies it.

## Art (images, sprites, backdrops, UI)

**ALL game art is original, procedurally generated by the scripts in `src/art/`
and committed to `public/assets/`.** It is project-owned / CC0 — no third-party
image assets are used anywhere in the game.

- Generator: `npm run art` (`src/art/build.mjs`) renders every PNG
  deterministically from a zero-dependency pixel toolkit (`src/art/lib/`) and a
  shared palette + style guide (`src/art/palette.mjs`). Re-runnable from a clean
  checkout with no external tools (no node-canvas, no headless browser).
- Never hand-edit the PNGs in `public/assets/` — edit the generator and re-run
  `npm run art` (CLAUDE.md convention).
- Status: PLAN-10 is replacing the runtime-generated placeholder rectangles with
  real committed pixel art one category at a time. As of ST-1 the committed real
  assets are the rider/bike recolor bases + their default fallbacks, the wheel,
  and the finish flag (`public/assets/sprites/`, `public/assets/props/`); the
  remaining textures still render as placeholders until their subtask lands.

## Fonts

- **Press Start 2P** — © 2012 The Press Start 2P Project Authors
  (cody@zone38.net), Reserved Font Name "Press Start 2P".
  Licensed under the **SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1**. Full license text
  ships in the repo at `public/assets/fonts/OFL.txt`.
  Files: `public/assets/fonts/PressStart2P-Regular.ttf`.

## Audio (music & sound effects)

_To be filled in by PLAN-10 ST-7 (audio)._ The game is fully playable muted, so
no audio ships until then. When audio is added, every track/SFX must be listed
here with its source and license (generated/synthesized → project-owned/CC0, or
a vendored CC0 file with a link to its source), so that "no license-unknown
assets" holds.

- Music (title/menu, riding, police-chase, party loops): _TBD_
- Jingles (level complete, gentle fail, tulip sparkle): _TBD_
- SFX (engine, brake, jump/land, car whoosh, siren, balloon pop, button): _TBD_
